entries.name: Gennai (Scorpion spymaster)
entries.note: Posed as a medicine-peddler; charming, sharp, escaped into the hills with his swordsman — wants the Falcon's secret; hostile, now exposed.

entries.name: The Scorpion Clan
entries.note: Seize Toritaka lands; their cell holds the leak and is moving — hostile / closing in.

entries.name: The power in the deep Shinomen
entries.note: Harvest souls / spread — malign, looming (quiet near the PC for now).

entries.name: Toritaka Jōji
entries.note: Akihiko's closest comrade-Warden, sworn confidant; senior to him; riding home at his side, blunt and loyal.

entries.name: Lord Toritaka Hatsue
entries.note: Hold the line via Akihiko — his lord & secret-sharer; fraying, declining.

entries.name: The captured porter
entries.note: Left bound on the hill 'for the Kami to judge' (days ago): freed himself, died, or retrieved by Gennai — and remembers the Warden who left him.

entries.name: Matsu Toshimoko (Emerald Magistrate)
entries.note: Emerald Magistrate (Lion/Matsu), gray-templed, by-the-book; came to the marches over the silenced villages & the Scorpion border. Witnessed Akihiko free the husk-boy with sun-fire. Wary, duty-bound, DEFERRED not won over — rides to Kyūden Toritaka for Lord Hatsue's answers; 'resumes on the Emperor's terms' if they don't hold.

entries.name: The freed boy of Hibari Mura
entries.note: A Hibari Mura reed-cutter the deep power puppeted across the ford; Akihiko severed the thread with Sacred sun-fire. Body alive & reclaimed, soul still gathered in the deep — soul-empty like Suzu.
